title: A Shaking World — Part 2
description: The news of Dressrosa spreads as the balance of power begins to shift.
scene: On pages 8–12, King Riku, Tsuru, Marines, Luffy, Trafalgar Law deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The war's finally coming to an end!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I already paid him, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We had a deal!

dialogue.speaker: Underworld Brokers
dialogue.text: Joker, you son of a...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The weapons should still be sitting in Dressrossa!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Going there is not an option; a marine Admiral's sitting on the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My deal for Devil Fruits!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What the hell is gonna happen to our deal for smile!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If it weren't for these two wedding brats!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What is it, Tsuru- chan?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There was no need for you to come all the way out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I should be the one saying that, inspector!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well... you have been chasing this particular pirate crew for quite some time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: On your orders!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Want some Okaki**?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A certain city

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A Granny's stolen a pizza and ran off! Find her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hmmmmmmm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: So, Doflamingo, huh? Dang. They sure got balls.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: makes me happy to be in the same generation as them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: A certain sky

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: High priest Urouge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: No,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Don't be silly! Right now we're...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Healing our wounds on a solitary cloud Islam-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: A certain sea

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Oh. Oh my. Our friends are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: They're doing quite well for themselves, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: We're definitely going to get Caesar, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Capisce, Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And just like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: They've made the first move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: This is a huge victory!

dialogue.speaker: Underworld Brokers
dialogue.text: Doflamingo is without a doubt connected in some way to Kaidou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: which means this play by them amounts to smacking him right in his face...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Well, if that was their end game... it's safe to assume that their true objective...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Really is the yonkou...

dialogue.speaker: Underworld Brokers
dialogue.text: Hundred-beast Kaidou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: I'm glad we're not after the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: We'd end up wasting precious resources just butting heads.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Our target is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Red-Hair Sharks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: A certain island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: He killed your dad!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo did!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: It was a long time ago... I don't harbor a grudge or anything anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: You serious? But damn, that's cold- blooded.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: If that's the case, why don't you lend us a hand as well!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: things are lookin' pretty grave. We've gotta let the boss know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: He's definitely gonna blow a fuse, though...

dialogue.speaker: Underworld Brokers
dialogue.text: Kaidou- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Where are you !?

dialogue.speaker: Underworld Brokers
dialogue.text: That idiot Joker's gone and fucked up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Our little smile gravy train ain't gonna be happening anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb with me, Isshou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Eeek!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: GyaA AAAAA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: You know exactly the weight an Admiral's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Admis- sign of oversight carries!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Why didn't you first report to HQ!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: IF I HAD, YOU ALL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: would have spun things into a news story...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: that suited your own agendas and motives...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: I too think the Shichibuki system should be done away with!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Two years ago, I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: "I was there! The day crocodile and his dealings were revealed to the world!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
